title: Information Retrieval Paradigms: Clarke & Cormack
description: A flowchart contrasting the query-focused 'Specificity' paradigm with the document-focused 'Exhaustivity' paradigm, highlighting the fundamental trade-off in IR system design.
relationships: Specificity aims for high precision by retrieving only the most relevant documents for a specific query
Exhaustivity aims for high recall by retrieving all documents that might be relevant to any aspect of the query
These principles represent a core trade-off in IR system design
